station_entry.speaker: Narrator
station_entry.text:
The station is nearly empty. The clock reads 11:47 PM.
The last train will arrive soon.
Three paths lie before you.

keep_walking_path.speaker: Narrator
keep_walking_path.text: You insert your ticket. The gate slides open with a mechanical hum.

keep_walking_platform.speaker: Narrator
keep_walking_platform.text:
The platform is quiet. A few people wait in silence.
The Stranger is there — standing by a pillar.
They smile. A relieved smile.

keep_walking_stranger.speaker: Stranger
keep_walking_stranger.text:
"Made it." It's not a question.
"I knew you would."
They look at the tunnel where the train will come.
"下次再见。"

keep_walking_train.speaker: Narrator
keep_walking_train.text:
The train arrives. The doors slide open.
You step inside. The warmth of the carriage envelops you.
As the doors close, you see the Stranger —
already fading, already turning away.
The train pulls into the dark. You're going somewhere.

turn_back_path.speaker: Narrator
turn_back_path.text:
You stop at the gate. Your hand hovers over the ticket.
Then you turn around.

turn_back_exit.speaker: Narrator
turn_back_exit.text:
The streets are empty. The rain hasn't stopped.
You walk back the way you came—
past the underpass, the bridge, the convenience store.
Everything looks the same. But different.

turn_back_office.speaker: Narrator
turn_back_office.text:
The office building looms ahead.
And there — at the entrance — the Stranger.
Standing exactly where you first saw them.
As if they never left.

turn_back_stranger.speaker: Stranger
turn_back_stranger.text:
"You're back." No surprise in their voice.
"I figured you would be."
They tilt their head. "Some routes don't end."
"They just begin again."

stay_path.speaker: Narrator
stay_path.text:
You sit on a cold bench on the platform.
The minutes pass. The clock ticks. 11:52. 11:58.

stay_wait.speaker: Narrator
stay_wait.text:
The Stranger sits down next to you.
They don't say anything. You don't either.
The two of you watch as the last train arrives…
…and departs again.

stay_after.speaker: Narrator
stay_after.text:
The platform is empty now. The Stranger stands up.
They don't look back. They walk toward a maintenance door
and disappear into the service tunnel.
